name: Merch store
tagline: Official 6cubed and 216Labs gear for fans and builders.
description: Next.js storefront for branded apparel, accessories, and stationery. Wire checkout via NEXT_PUBLIC_MERCH_STORE_URL or per-product URLs in src/data/products.ts.

env_vars.description: Optional default URL for the Buy button when a product has no specific link (e.g. Shopify collection)
Canonical site URL for metadata (default: https://merch.6cubed.app)
